message:
perf: upgrade progress and resilience tracking from Mutex to RwLock

Convert internal HashMap locking from Mutex to RwLock to enable
concurrent reads on hot paths. ProgressController now allows multiple
concurrent readers for latest_update, current_phase, elapsed_ms, etc.
ResilienceLayer adds double-checked locking on connector_state()
lookup to minimize write-lock contention.

- Replace Mutex with RwLock in ProgressController
- Use .read() for all read-only operations, .write() for mutations
- Add fast-path optimization in ResilienceLayer::connector_state()
- Simplify timeout predicate test to sync (no functional change)
- Fix ErrorWindow test assertion (was recording extra success)
- Remove redundant edge-case tests from progress module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
